texto: People ask me all the time, 'Are you fed up with reality TV?' At the end of the day, it can affect my career in the sense that the more reality shows there are, the less scripted dramas out there, but I can't ever really knock them. I started on 'Popstars,' which was a reality talent show. I have respect for them.
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Josh Henderson que provoca passagem do tempo e prioridades. Ao questionar “People ask me all the time, 'Are you fed up with reality TV?' At the end of the day, it can affec…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre trabalho, time, day, com foco em termino e day.
